inputFieldTemplates.name: template-person-race
inputFieldTemplates.declaration:
INPUT[inlineSelect(
  option(Human),
  option(Elf),
  option(Dwarf),
  option(Halfling),
  option(Gnome),
  option(Half-Elf),
  option(Half-Orc),
  option(Tiefling),
  option(Leonin)
)]

inputFieldTemplates.name: template-group-type
inputFieldTemplates.declaration: INPUT[inlineSelect(option(Knightly Order), option(Religious Order), option(Magic Academy), option(Artisan Guild), option(Merchant Consortium), option(Criminal Syndicate), option(Mercenary Company), option(Noble House), option(Secret Society or Cult), option(Adventurers’ Guild))]

inputFieldTemplates.name: template-hub-category
inputFieldTemplates.declaration: INPUT[inlineSelect(option(City +1500), option(Town +200), option(Village +80), option(Hamlet <80), option(Encampment), option(Keep), option(Fortress), option(Stronghold))]

inputFieldTemplates.name: template-item-type
inputFieldTemplates.declaration: INPUT[inlineListSuggester(option(Alchemical), option(Artifact), option(Consumable), option(Cursed), option(Intelligent), option(Invested), option(Magical), option(Relic), option(Rune), option(Snare), option(Stance), option(Talisman), option(Worn))]

inputFieldTemplates.name: template-person-age-range
inputFieldTemplates.declaration: INPUT[inlineSelect(option(Infant), option(Child), option(Teenager), option(Young Adult), option(Adult), option(Elder))]

inputFieldTemplates.name: template-place-category
inputFieldTemplates.declaration: INPUT[inlineSelect(option(Commerce), option(Agriculture), option(Military), option(Philosophy), option(Industrial), option(Nesting), option(Government))]

inputFieldTemplates.name: template-person-class
inputFieldTemplates.declaration: INPUT[inlineSelect(option(Artificer), option(Barbarian), option(Bard), option(Cleric), option(Druid), option(Fighter), option(Monk), option(Paladin), option(Ranger), option(Rogue), option(Sorcerer), option(Warlock), option(Wizard))]

inputFieldTemplates.name: template-district-category
inputFieldTemplates.declaration: INPUT[inlineSelect(option(Generic District), option(Government & Nobility), option(Commerce & Craft), option(Residential), option(Faith & Knowledge), option(Military & Order), option(Hidden & Fringe))]
